Shissar Nullifier Staff  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Charges: Unlimited
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 24
DMG: 11 Dmg Bonus: 36 AC: 4
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
INT: +10 MANA: +50
Effect: Tashania (Any Slot/Can Equip, Casting Time: 2.0) at Level 50
WT: 5.6 Size: LARGE
Class: ENC
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Shissar Nullifier Staff

Charges: Unlimited
Skill: 2H Blunt Atk Delay: 24
DMG: 11 Dmg Bonus: 36 AC: 4
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.

Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Stackable:No

Expansion: Ruins of Kunark

stats

Uploaded August 2nd, 2019 by stickleback
Send a correction
Post Comment
wrong spell
QuoteReply
# Aug 28 2005 at 3:38 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592269915463
42 posts
just saw this in baz to day and the spell is tashania (lvl 44 spell) not tashani (lvl 18 spell)

big diff makes i a lot mroe useful at higher lvls

and dont u hate how all the tash spells are only like 1 letter off fomr eachother just a littel mistake i noticed on the site
▲ Page top
Lucky accident
QuoteReply
# Feb 06 2003 at 11:01 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759368273
View User Forum
9 posts
A beastlord in our guild went shopping in the Bazaar (Povar) the other day and accidentally lag-bought this staff for 500 pp. She had no use for it and I figured 500 pp was an excellent price, so I repaid her for her loss and took the staff for the guild.
We have three chanters in the guild -- my GL with a high 1HB and nearly no 2HB skill, an officer's chanter that she hardly ever plays and a new level 12 played by an officer's daughter (who has some officer potential of her own, despite being only 13).
With the Book of Obulus equipped in my secondary slot, it wasn't worth losing the melee skill and some later flexibility just for 2 INT and 5 mana extra, so the staff went to the level 12 chanter who had started off with a 2HB. She won't see the proc for a long, long while but immediately ran off and soloed an orc centurian in three blows.
It's one of those moments that just makes you smile and remember why this game is truly a pleasure sometimes. :-)

Edited, Thu Feb 6 10:35:58 2003
▲ Page top
Argh!
QuoteReply
# Dec 03 2002 at 7:52 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591768067005
4 posts
Well I got one a couple days ago off VS, was one of only 2 chanters there, and I won the roll. Lucky day I think, so I go take my new whack-a-mole stick outside for a test spin... click, click, click, no effect at lvl 45. I work REAL hard and get to 46 in a day... click, click, click... NOTHING! Well I imagine this won't be clickable till 49 like my blazing earring of energy. ARGH! Oh well, at least I can work on my soloin with it, was really good at dispacthing Ragers in DL with it. Say, lookey there, 2H up to skill of 8.



Shanyl of the Gems

Level 46 Enchantress
250 Skill Jewler

Brell Serilis

# Jun 20 2003 at 9:49 AM Rating: Decent

This stick drove me crazy! a 44 spell and it wouldn't work for me until I hit 51. BAH.
Now I am thrilled to have an extra spell slot to play with. WOOT!

Mohgedian
▲ Page top
effect
QuoteReply
# Jan 19 2002 at 1:55 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756654380
140 posts
Tashani
Adding 1 Poison counters
Decrease Magic Resist from 20 (L20) to 23 (L26)


--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Classes: Enc (L20)

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Skill: Abjuration
Allowable Targets: All

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Range to Target: 200 feet

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Resistance Check: None

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Mana Required: 20
Spell Duration: Unknown
Duration Formula: 9
Casting Time: 1.0 seconds
Spell Recovery: 2.25 seconds

--------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Spell cast on you: You hear the barking of the Tashani.
Spell cast on someone: Soandso glances nervously about.
Spell fades: The barking fades.
▲ Page top
RE: effect
QuoteReply
# Jan 24 2002 at 12:00 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591750677865
Scholar
16 posts
Actual effect is Tashania not Tashani. Tashania does a 31-33 point MR debuff
▲ Page top
RE: effect
QuoteReply
# Mar 27 2002 at 7:07 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592758866351
View User Forum
Scholar
23 posts
If it debuffs MR by 31 - 35 then it's Tashani.

Tashania debuffs MR by 50 points.

Baron Stiles Corleone
55 Beguiler from Neriak
<Silent Souls>
Vallon Zek (PvP Teams) Server
▲ Page top
RE: effect
QuoteReply
# Mar 29 2002 at 12:16 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592251550403
Sage
215 posts
Ummm... No... Tashania does around 30-35 MR debuff. Tashani does 20ish. The effect is Tashania (as per the picture).

How long you been a chanter?
▲ Page top
RE: effect
QuoteReply
# Apr 24 2002 at 3:08 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1592758866351
View User Forum
Scholar
23 posts
My apologies on this, you are correct. I play on Vallon Zek, and when spells effecting resists are cast, they do 1.5x the normal amount (i.e. Tash, Malo, etc) So on my server when I tashania a player (myself included) it debuffs 50 MR points. However, in PvE I can't tell you. I had forgotten about the PvP debuff modifier on that. My apologies again.

Baron Stiles Corleone
56 Enchanter from Neriak
Vallon Zek (PvP Teams) Server
<Silent Souls>
▲ Page top
RE: effect
QuoteReply
# Jul 07 2002 at 10:36 AM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592251550403
Sage
215 posts
Ahhh... I wasnt aware of that... Thanks for the info!
▲ Page top
RE: effect
QuoteReply
# Dec 17 2003 at 12:45 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593966493699
178 posts
So this procs at 51 huh? Not great but not horrible.

Nice thing is that while it is a 44 spell, Tashania (indeed this is what it is supposed to click, not Tashani) is a QUEST spell... which is nice... if you have not gotten around to doing the quest (I have, but what the hey, right?) now you dont need to.

My enchanter is 44 now, got the item when guild just took out VS last night... but even until clickable it is a nice way to get 2hb skill up... seriously, how many 2hb weaps ARE there that have as low a delay as 24? With Celerity I expect to be whacking away pretty quick... in my groups unless I need to mezz or rebuff they wont mind me working up my skill whacking at the mob... certain I will never steal aggro LOL....

The other pri/sec items I have are Shai din ceremonial dagger (awesome little sticker for enchanters from the Betrayal area of Chardok B) and Rokyl's Channelling Crystal for extended enhancements... but when not buffing I find giving up those two for this staff I lose no direct mana (50 vs 50) and only lose currently 2 int (12 from dagger compared to 10 from staff... this will get up to 5 I think once I am at the recc level for the dagger) but since my int will soon be over 255 with KEI (next level, YAY!) the loss of the int is pretty irrelevant. Also the dagger has some saves but nothing to worry much about in regular groupings as I see it)

All in all a nice little acquisition, and I can click the sucker all the time in groups and solo without using up my mana... always a plus.

Sylver
▲ Page top

Nice effect. Nice stat bonuses. Nice drop from VS for you enchanters. Have you checked out the cleric weapon drop? We get a no bonus two handed stick with resist magic. Makes me feel like Naggy all over again. But at least there is a CHANCe VS will drop the Donal's Legs. Unlike Naggy's LAME drops for a cleric.

# Dec 14 2001 at 4:13 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591768828426
Scholar
20 posts
My enchanter has the staff. The effect is the 44th level spell Tashania, which is an unresistable magic resistance drop in the low 30s.

Does anyone know the exact level an enchanter has to be before she can trigger the effect?
▲ Page top
RE: Effect
QuoteReply
# Jul 02 2003 at 11:58 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592256766708
Scholar
37 posts
Level 50
http://lucy.fnord.net/item.html?id=6676

I found this in the bazaar for 1200 =). I have yet to do my coin quest(I know, bad enchanter), but this has int and raw mana as well as the clicky effect. We don't get another decent tash until level 57 so i will be using this for a while. And yes i know we get one at 55 but its a weaker ae version, and i don't plan on using it much.

This might not be the pantheon of enchanter staffs and the click casting time is a second slower(not that i will be rapid tashing anything anytime soon), but when there is no one working on debuffing other then me, the mr debuff clicky and the free spell slot for cripple, some utility spell or a nice mana tap is nice to make up for stats lost in my off hand.

Some people hate it, some people love it...its all in how you use it.
▲ Page top
This Item Rocks
QuoteReply
# Aug 02 2001 at 12:22 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592757935784
34 posts
This Item Rocks. Plain and simple

# Jun 07 2001 at 8:28 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592247994243
Scholar
78 posts
Is the tashania effect instant cast, or the cast time same? If it's higher, then this staff really is useless, but if it's equal to or less than (preferrably nil, that would be so fuggin' nasty) then it's actually quite valuable.
▲ Page top
RE: question to those who have
QuoteReply
# Aug 21 2001 at 1:20 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592756910189
29 posts
The big advatage is thats one more spell you can mem since you won't need to mem tash
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: May 25 2001 at 12:34 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Ok, for me and other chanters i know, we really never unmem Tash. But the great thing about this staff would be for the tash effect, not because of the 30 mana tash costs, but because we can unmem tash for another spell.
#Anonymous, Posted: May 05 2001 at 11:11 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) I really think that this is among the worst pieces of loot you could get off something of VS's caliber... it would be good if it was 1hb... but look at it. 10 int, 50 mana? That's freakin ridiculous. I can use a freakin L5 de enchanter to get me a stein of moggok, that's the 10 int right there, and 50 mana isnt really that great. Plus, any chanter 44+ who doesnt KEEP tashania memd has issues... any decent chanter that I've EVER seen casts tash HABITUALLY... there's just no other way to fight. Come on fokes, tashania costs like 30 mana... what an effect =P. Now maybe if it was beserker spirit/rampage triggered... then I might think it was decent as a free rune-type effect.. but TASH? Look at the effects on the stuff that other classes get from VS.. it puts this POS to shame.
#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 01 2001 at 2:15 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) You're exactly correct in fact Verant is soooo concerned with making their $10.00 a month that they don't want the players to truly have fun. Where's my chain lightning or delayed blast fireball? Where's my robe of the archmagi? Where is my staff of the archmagi? The monk is cracking people in the jaw for 500 and i'm over here struggling to hold a stupid baboon charmed with my 240 charisma for more than 3 seconds. HELLO FAIR? This staff is as gay as all the rest of the stuff that dropped in Kunark and VOS for us. 2hb WTF?
RE: VS loot?
QuoteReply
# Feb 17 2003 at 11:28 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759046203
97 posts
I think both of you guys need to shut up and play a different game.

So what? Life is not fair. Get over it.

▲ Page top
Nice item
QuoteReply
# May 01 2001 at 12:08 PM Rating: Good
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I got this a few nights ago. It is nice to not have the standard Crude Stien/Rod of Glamour combo, people have to inspect me now to find out I'm a chanter. The AC and the MANA are nice to have, the INT isn't bad but I already have enough items to get me above the 200 soft cap that it's really not that important. What is great is the effect, Tashania is the level 44 spell of the same name. Essentially I never have to go back and forth in my spell book to mem and un-mem this spell anymore, and frees up an extra slot to keep another spell in.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Apr 26 2001 at 2:20 PM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) LOL 2k ? an item like this ( which is prob OFF VS ) im sure sells for no under 20k. does 10 int plus 50mana, and effect tashani is nice, let alone im sure its insainly rare.
For what it's worth:
QuoteReply
# Apr 24 2001 at 6:09 PM Rating: Default
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
I would gladly pay 2k for this one. It would be nice not to stand out so much as a chanter, the mana from this thing would be about the same as 2 Steins of Mogguk, a little AC is always nice, and the "Tashania" effect is excellent.
Is it really true that this comes off of random mobs?
